title: athyrium filix-femina f. strictum
intro: Athyrium filix-femina f. strictum, also known as the upright lady fern, is a variety of fern that is commonly found in shaded areas with moist soil. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. In herbal medicine, the leaves of Athyrium filix-femina f. strictum are used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote health and well-being, and to treat a range of health conditions.
